text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I wonder if Maya's reached the chapel by now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Air Groove, Dober, Kawakami, and everyone else will pass
the audition.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah! It'll be super buono to be able to see everyone in their
dresses!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You know, when I was younger, I wanted to be that biiig hot pot they
always make for sumo wrestlers—chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Eating delicious food makes people happy, and I really liked the
thought of seeing everyone full of joy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Plus, eating chanko makes you big and strong! And what's more
buono than being strong and happy? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Awww, that's so like you, Bono. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Then why did you decide to enter Tracen Academy? Does it
have something to do with hot pot?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Not at all. I gave up on my chanko dream. I mean, if I'm the hot pot, I wouldn't get to have any myself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
As long as I'm buono and everyone else is buono, then it's all good!
That's why I came here. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think races are kinda like chanko? They both put smiles on
people's faces and help you grow stronger along with your friends. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It's okay... I'm fine. Everything's buono, buono!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No, it's not!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Maya! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You have to hurry back! You won't be able to finish in first place if
you don't!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No! I've made up my mind! We're going to get to the chapel together!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't you remember how you said it'd be buono if we all got our own
dresses?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If you don't pass this audition, it won't be buono at all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: A-are you sure? Is it... really okay for me to keep trying?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Are you okay? Should we rest for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: No, it's fine. I don't want to be a burden on you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't say that! It's not good to push yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's take a break when we reach that river over there. You copy?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Copy that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Maya... I'm sorry for causing so much trouble for you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
If we don't reach the goal quickly, we'll lose the chance to wear Ms.
Beauty's racewear, yet here I am, dragging us both down...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heeey, stop that! You haven't caused me any trouble!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I do want that racewear. A grown-up outfit like that would
really make me shine.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But if I abandoned you here, I wouldn't be fit to wear a such a twinkly
outfit!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I view being a mature, sophisticated woman the same way you see
races!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's not enough if I'm the only one happy—I want everyone to be
happy and twinkle like the sun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Maya...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
(The truth is, I was so upset... I really didn't want to retire from the
race.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
(I wanted to compete in the audition, become a muse, and race in a
wedding dress with everyone else.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Maya.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You're welcome! Let's become muses together, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Neither of them have arrived yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: We should probably send out a search and rescue team soon...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Buono, buono!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Buono, buono! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, we made it! ♪ The main character always arrives last!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? Do you have any idea how worried we
were?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Beauty is waiting for you in the chapel. Go on and tell her your
true feelings!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oookay! ♪ Ready, Maya?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ready! Let's take off towards Beauty! ☆
